messages.content: 翻译接下来的话
很抱歉，我不能处理有待翻译的信息，因为我需要更具体的上下文以及与您的对话计时没有协同性。请为我提供更多上下文，以便我的处理效果更佳。

Figure 5b–e are the recovery graphs of the prediction results of Salinas-A data using SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AENBSVM, respectively. If you look closely, you can see that the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AENBSVM has improved compared to SVM. The classification accuracy of each category is shown in Figure 6, and Figure 5 is analyzed in detail through Figure 6. AENSVM and AEBNSVM achieve 0.08%, 0.92% and 0.16% accu- racy improvement over SVM on Corn_senesced_green_weeds, Lettuce_romaine_4wk and Lettuce_romaine_6wk categories, respectively, where TWSVM has 1.11% better accuracy over SVM in the Lettuce_romaine_4wk category. AENSVM and AEBNSVM can balance empirical risk minimization and structural risk minimization by adjusting parameters c1 and c3. The classification results of TWSVM show that empirical risk minimization can make the Lettuce_romaine_4wk classification effect better. AENSVM and AEBNSVM also achieve better results than SVM by adjusting the degree of empirical risk minimization, and the characteristics of structural risk minimization also ensure the accuracy of other categories. As in the Lettuce_romaine_5wk category, the classification accuracy of SVM, AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.22% higher than that of TWSVM. It can be seen from Table 2 that the difficulty of Salinas-A classification is low, and SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AEBNSVM all get more than 99% classification accuracy. The overall classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.14% higher than SVM and 0.32% higher than TWSVM, the Kappa coefficient is 0.18% higher than SVM and 0.39% higher than TWSVM.AENSVM; AEBNSVM non-parallel support vector machines are more suitable for data distribution under the premise of good SVM properties, so they get better experimental results.

图5b-e为使用SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM对Salinas-A数据进行预测的恢复图。仔细观察可以发现，与SVM相比，AENSVM和AENBSVM的分类准确率有所提高。各类别的分类准确率显示在图6中，图5通过图6进行详细分析。在玉米枯萎绿草、莴苣罗马4周和莴苣罗马6周这几个类别中，AENSVM和AENBSVM分别比SVM提高了0.08%、0.92%和0.16%的准确率，其中TWSVM在莴苣罗马4周类别中的准确率比SVM高1.11%。AENSVM和AENBSVM可以通过调整参数c1和c3平衡经验风险最小化和结构风险最小化。TWSVM的分类结果显示，经验风险最小化可以使莴苣罗马4周的分类效果更好。调整经验风险最小化的程度，AENSVM和AENBSVM也比SVM取得了更好的结果，并且结构风险最小化的特征也保证了其他类别的准确性。像在莴苣罗马5周类别中，SVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM的分类准确率比TWSVM高0.22%。可以从表2中看出，Salinas-A分类的难度不高，SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM的分类准确率都超过了99%。AENSVM和AENBSVM的整体分类准确率比SVM高0.14%，比TWSVM高0.32%，Kappa系数比SVM高0.18%，比TWSVM高0.39%。AENSVM和AENBSVM非平行支持向量机更适合在SVM属性良好的前提下进行数据分布，因此它们得到了更好的实验结果。

Figure 5. Salinas-A hyperspectral image classification result image.  (a) (ground truth), (b) SVM,
(c) TWSVM, (d) AENSVM, (e) AEBNSVM.
图5. Salinas-A高光谱图像分类结果图像。(a)（实际情况），(b) SVM，(c) TWSVM，(d) AENSVM，(e) AEBNSVM。
Figure 6. Classification results of different categories of Salinas-A hyperspectral images.
图6. Salinas-A高光谱图像不同类别的分类结果。
Table 2. Classification results of Salinas-A hyperspectral images.
表2. Salinas-A高光谱图像的分类结果。
The division of training test set of Pavia Center is shown in Table 3.
Pavia Center训练测试集的划分如表3所示。
Table 3. Ground truth classes for the Pavia Center scene and their respective numbers of samples.
表3. Pavia Center场景的实际分类和相应的样本数。

Figure 7b–e are the recovery results of the Pavia Center data predicted by SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AENBSVM, respectively. Figure 8 shows the classification accu- racy of each category in Figure 7 in detail. On the Tree, Self-Blocking Bricks, Bitumen, Tiles, Shadows and Meadows categories, the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.25%, 0.67%, 0.46%, 0.22%, 0.41% and 0.58% higher than SVM, respectively. The classifi- cation accuracy of TWSVM is 0.86%, 2.98%, 0.44% and 0.53% higher than that of SVM in the categories of Tree, Self-Blocking Bricks, Tiles and Meadows, respectively. The classification accuracy of Bitumen and Shadows categories is reduced by 0.35% and 1.71%, respectively.It can be seen that the classification results of TWSVM on Tree, Self-Blocking Bricks and Tiles categories are better, indicating that these categories can obtain better classification accuracy when the proportion of empirical risk minimization is high. However, it can be seen from Table 4 that the overall classification accuracy of TWSVM is 0.08% lower than that of SVM, and the kappa coefficient is 0.12% lower than that of SVM. In order not to affect the overall accuracy, the empirical risk minimization terms of AENSVM and AEBNSVM cannot be weighted too high, so the classification accuracy of TWSVM cannot be achieved on these categories. On the Asphalt category, the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.22% lower than that of SVM, and the classification accuracy of TWSVM is 2.44% lower than that of SVM. It can be seen that increasing the weight of empirical risk minimization will reduce the classification accuracy of the Asphalt category, but in order to make the overall classification accuracy higher, the classification accuracy of this category is traded off. From the overall classification accuracy in Table 4, it can be seen that the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.25% higher than that of SVM, and the kappa coefficient is 0.36% higher than that of SVM. AENSVM and AEBNSVM still have higher kappa coefficients on the premise of higher accuracy, confirming their effectiveness in adding an additional empirical risk minimization term.

图7b-e为SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM预测的Pavia Center数据的恢复结果。图8详细显示了图7中各个类别的分类准确度。在树、自阻塞砖块、沥青、瓷砖、阴影和牧场这些类别中，AENSVM和AENBSVM的分类准确率比SVM分别提高了0.25%、0.67%、0.46%、0.22%、0.41%和0.58%。TWSVM在树、自阻塞砖块、瓷砖和牧场等类别中的分类准确率比SVM分别高0.86%、2.98%、0.44%和0.53%。沥青和阴影类别的分类准确率分别降低了0.35%和1.71%。可以看出，TWSVM在树、自阻塞砖块和瓷砖等类别上的分类结果更好，说明当经验风险最小化的比例较高时，这些类别可以获得更好的分类准确率。但从表4中可以看出，TWSVM的整体分类准确性比SVM低0.08%，Kappa系数比SVM低0.12%。为了不影响整体准确性，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的经验风险最小化项不能过分加权，因此这些类别上无法达到TWSVM的分类准确率。在沥青类别上，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类准确率比SVM低0.22%，而TWSVM的分类准确率比SVM低2.44%。可以看出，增加经验风险最小化的权重会降低沥青类别的分类准确率，但为了使整体分类准确率更高，这个类别的准确率必须作出权衡。从表4中的整体分类准确率可以看出，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类准确率比SVM高0.25%，Kappa系数比SVM高0.36%。在准确率更高的前提下，AENSVM和AEBNSVM仍具有更高的Kappa系数，从而证实它们在添加额外的经验风险最小化项时的有效性。

Figure 7. Pavia Center hyperspectral image classification result image. (a) (ground truth), (b) SVM,
(c) TWSVM, (d) AENSVM, (e) AEBNSVM.
图7. Pavia Center高光谱图像分类结果图像。(a)（实际情况），(b) SVM，(c) TWSVM，(d) AENSVM，(e) AEBNSVM。
Table 4. Classification results of Pavia Center hyperspectral images.
表4. Pavia Center高光谱图像的分类结果。
The division of training test set of Pavia University is shown in Table 5.
Pavia University训练测试集的划分如表5所示。
Table 5. Ground truth classes for the Pavia University scene and their respective numbers of samples.
表5. Pavia University场景的实际分类和相应的样本数。
Figure 8. Classification results of different categories of Pavia Center hyperspectral images.
图8. Pavia Center高光谱图像不同类别的分类结果。

Figure 9b–e are the recovery graphs of the prediction results of Pavia University data using SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AENBSVM, respectively. It can be seen that the prediction results of AENSVM and AENSVM are better in some categories. Figure 10 shows the classification accuracy of each category in Figure 9 in detail, followed by a detailed analysis of Figure 10. AENSVM and AEBNSVM have the same weights for the additional empirical risk minimization term added when all categories are classified during parameter tuning. This behavior will produce better or worse results for the classification accuracy of a single category than SVM. Take Meadows and Bare Soil as the two more representative categories to illustrate. For the Meadows category, the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 2.88% higher than that of SVM, indicating that the additional empirical risk minimization term under the current weights improves the classification accuracy of the Meadows category. For the Soil category, the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 2.95% lower than that of SVM, indicating that the additional empirical risk minimization under the current weights has a detrimental effect on the Soil category. However, from the overall classification accuracy in Table 6, the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM has better performance than that of standard SVM and TWSVM. The accuracy of AENSVM is 1.05% higher than that of standard SVM, and the Kappa coefficient is 1.29% higher than that of SVM. The accuracy of AEBNSVM is 0.95% higher than that of standard SVM, and the Kappa coefficient is 1.16% higher than that of SVM. This shows that although the additional empirical risk minimization makes the classification results of some single categories worse than SVM, it can achieve better classification results as a whole. The effectiveness of AENSVM and AENBSVM on the multi-classification problem of hyperspectral remote sensing images is demonstrated.

图9b-e为使用SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM预测Pavia University数据的恢复图。可以看出，在某些类别中，AENSVM和AENSVM的预测结果比较好。图10详细显示了图9中各个类别的分类准确度，随后对图10进行了详细分析。在参数调整期间进行所有类别分类时，AENSVM和AEBNSVM对于添加的额外经验风险最小化项具有相同的权重。这种行为会对单个类别的分类准确性产生比SVM更好或更差的结果。以牧场和裸土两个更代表性的类别为例。对于牧场类别，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类准确率比SVM高2.88%，说明当前权重下的额外经验风险最小化项提高了牧场类别的分类准确率。对于裸土类别，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类准确率比SVM低2.95%，说明当前权重下的额外经验风险最小化对裸土类别产生了不利影响。然而，从表6的总体分类准确率来看，AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类准确率比标准SVM和TWSVM表现更好。AENSVM的准确率比标准SVM高1.05%，Kappa系数比SVM高1.29%。AEBNSVM的准确率比标准SVM高0.95%，Kappa系数比SVM高1.16%。这表明，尽管额外经验风险最小化会使某些单个类别的分类结果比SVM更差，但它可以作为整体实现更好的分类结果。 AENSVM和AENBSVM在高光谱遥感图像的多类分类问题上的有效性得到了证明。

Figure 9. Pavia University hyperspectral image classification result image. (a) (ground truth),
(b) SVM, (c) TWSVM, (d) AENSVM, (e) AEBNSVM.
图9. Pavia University高光谱图像分类结果图像。(a)（实际情况），(b) SVM，(c) TWSVM，(d) AENSVM，(e) AEBNSVM。
Figure 10. Classification results of different categories of Pavia University hyperspectral images.
图10. Pavia University高光谱图像不同类别的分类结果。
Table 6. Classification results of Pavia University hyperspectral images.
表6. Pavia University高光谱图像的分类结果。
The division of training test set of Kennedy Space Center is shown in Table 7.
Kennedy Space Center训练测试集的划分如表7所示。
